Video.summary: Chris tests a new welder on Project Spartan's roll cage while Eric inspects the motor.
Video.title: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Image.alt: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Video.summary: Chris and Eric battle the truly insane rust in Project Spartan's '69 M715 Kaiser Jeep cab.
Video.title: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Image.alt: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are tackling Project Spartan axles and turbocharging the Polaris UTV for off-road adventures.
Video.title: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Image.alt: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Video.summary: Our 1969 Jeep M715 Project Spartan is getting a frame-up overhaul to look like a truck again.
Video.title: Lighting the Way Forward

Video.summary: Can our budget build rival a new Lexus?
Video.title: The Perfect Project Car?

Video.summary: Shane Lile's purple-over-red '55 Chevy Bel Air Gasser: an eye-popping, custom drag strip beast!
Video.title: Shane Lile - Gasshole

Video.summary: We fabricate a new cross member, mounting brackets, and install the transfer case on our 1969 Jeep Kaiser.
Video.title: Assembling Our Base

Video.summary: Is custom exhaust worth it on a budget build?
Video.title: Tune & Tone

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: We clean up our 1972 C-10 front end with relocated hood hinges and a custom bed frame.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 6: Bed Redefined

Video.summary: We install the engine and trans, make brake lines, then fab a clean, simple exhaust on our 1972 C-10.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Video.summary: Brian and Jason unbox a budget 2011 Lexus IS 250 body kit from China. Will it fit or need cutting?
Video.title: Body Kit Bolt Ons

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie machine a beastly Small Block Ford for serious pump-gas track power.
Video.title: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1

Image.alt: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1
Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1
Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1

Video.summary: We transform our classic C-10 with bodywork and a flawless pearl two-tone finish.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 8: Pearlfection

Video.summary: Brian and Jason have 48 hours to finish Project Budget Baller's audio and wheel upgrades.
Video.title: Final 48 Hour Fixes

Video.summary: "Dark Matters," Jason Mode's '68 C10, is a subtly modded, powerful truck with killer black and red style.
Video.title: Jason Mode - Dark Matters C10

Video.summary: You GM fans are in for a real treat as the guys transform a 1985 Buick Regal grandma car.
Video.title: Street Regal

Video.summary: This 1970 Mustang will take a 50 year leap into the future, and we're building it to give away!
Video.title: EBC Mustang Sweepstakes Project

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle team dives into building a solid foundation for this Resto Mod.
Video.title: Mustang Backside Alterations

Video.summary: What do you get when you combine a Bug and a UTV? The answer: BajAwesome.
Video.title: Beetle to BajAwesome

Video.summary: We add a custom fit roll cage, fabricated louvers, and a bunch of style points to this baja style bug.
Video.title: Baja Makeover

Video.summary: Baja Style bug gets a 80's retro style paint job to go along with a long travel suspension.
Video.title: Retro Baja Bug

Video.summary: Johnson's Hot Rod Shop's '32 Ford Roadster: a wild, hot pink, 500hp drivable masterpiece!
Video.title: Johnson Hot Rod - 32 Roadster

Video.summary: The EBC Fastback Mustang has to hook and stick to the ground.
Video.title: A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic

Image.alt: A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic
A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic
A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic

Video.summary: The EBC Fastback Mustang is transformed.
Video.title: Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation

Image.alt: Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation
Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation
Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle crew creates a custom exhaust with some TIG Tech.
Video.title: TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover

Image.alt: TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover
TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover
TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel roll an Hurst Olds into the shop and begin adding thunder back into this classic.
Video.title: Hurst Olds Part 1: Ride The Lightning

Image.alt: Hurst Olds Part 1: Ride The Lightning
Hurst Olds Part 1: Ride The Lightning
Hurst Olds Part 1: Ride The Lightning

Video.summary: We restore a '83 Hurst Olds retro rocket’s finish to a showroom shine.
Video.title: Hurst Olds – Part 02

Video.summary: Grease and gears begin to fly as we swap out our 307 engine for one built in shop of Joe Mondello.
Video.title: Hurst Olds – Part 03

Video.summary: We wire up and cool off our Mondello big-block to take the Hurst's performance from worst to first.
Video.title: Hurst Olds – Part 04

Video.summary: Ford’s high-revving modern engine gets some racy parts, then it is put to the test in the dyno cell!
Video.title: Coyote Power

Video.summary: The '89 Blazer 4x4 returns for lockers in the rear - and new gearing up front, along with steering upgrades
Video.title: Klassy K5 Axle Rebuild

Video.summary: After months of prep, the '89 Blazer hits the paint booth for a custom mix of color.
Video.title: Chevy Blazer Custom Paint

Video.summary: Klassy K5 returns from fresh paint for re-assembly, and interior goodies.
Video.title: Chevy Blazer Assembly/Interior

Video.summary: The supercharged big block Blazer hits the trails in search of a big mud hole.
Video.title: Supercharged '89 K5 Square Body Searches For a Mud Hole

Image.alt: Supercharged '89 K5 Square Body Searches For a Mud Hole
Supercharged '89 K5 Square Body Searches For a Mud Hole
Supercharged '89 K5 Square Body Searches For a Mud Hole

Video.summary: How to get factory-match paint for your ’69 Dodge Dart. Color mixing tips for Project Bullseye.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Match Game

Video.summary: Installing front and back suspension on a 1969 Dodge Dart, with tips for control, safety, and style.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Suspension Installation

Video.summary: We're making real progress on Project Bullseye, our '69 Dodge Dart, with suspension, wiring, and paint.
Video.title: Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Image.alt: Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash
Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash
Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Video.summary: With its rear axle installed, new tires mounted, and trim blacked out, our 1969 Dart is now on all fours.
Video.title: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Image.alt: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Video.summary: Project Bullseye gets a power upgrade, brakes, steering, painted scooped hood, and Swinger stripe.
Video.title: Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop

Image.alt: Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop
Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop
Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop

Video.summary: As we resume work on our 1966 Chevy Nova, we learn that this project may go from Starstruck to Struck Out.
Video.title: Project Struck Out / 69 GTO Part 1

Video.summary: The warden's calling for diagnostics for Detroit Muscle's next prisoner, their 1969 Pontiac GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 2 - Medical Checkup

Video.summary: Our 1969 Pontiac GTO needs to bulk up before breaking out so we modify the chassis and install new fuel lines.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 3 - Yard Time

Video.summary: Project Henchman is hoping to get a new look with a new paint job that'll make this '69 Pontiac GTO shine.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 4 - Prison Tats

Video.summary: The 1969 GTO Project Henchman gets a shiny new exterior look.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 5 - New Chains

Video.summary: Steel meets style – Today the boys finally lay down some paint on their ’69 GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness

Image.alt: 69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness
69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness
69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness

Video.summary: Project Cream Puff gets air-ride and a supercharger for a slammed, powerful C-10 street machine.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power
Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power
Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power

Video.summary: Today our guys are taking some liberties transforming a Jeep Wagoneer into a S-U-V performance beast!
Video.title: TrashHawk

Video.summary: We’re transforming a beater ‘74 Bronco into a head-turning beach cruiser.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco

Video.summary: Dyno Day! We assemble our 363 SBF beast and reveal the project it was built for.
Video.title: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 2

Image.alt: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 2

Video.summary: We tear down Project Spartan to rebuild it, but its surprisingly strong engine changes our plans.
Video.title: Kaiser Jeep Chaos

Video.summary: Our 1969 Project Spartan Jeep gets custom exhaust, rear suspension, and body mounts.
Video.title: Rear Suspension Throwdown
